creator: llevier@argosnet.com
text:
Hi Edwin,

A long time since our last exchange :D

Yes, patch is basic, just a version update.

That is fine to me.

Thanks !!

Brgrds


At 08:50 23/09/2010, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
>Maintainer of security/squidclamav,
>
>Please note that PR ports/150873 has just been submitted.
>
>If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
>you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
>and a committer will take care of it.
>
>The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/150873
>
>--
>Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
>edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
>--
>Ce message a =E9t=E9 v=E9rifi=E9 par MailScanner
>pour des virus ou des polluriels et rien de
>suspect n'a =E9t=E9 trouv=E9.
